rawIntent: [gestalt-maintenance/CONTEXT_ALIGNMENT] Reconcile docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: entity 'props' exists in the domain model but no module references it. Decide whether to introduce the module under src/modules/props/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.

successCriteria.description: The 'props' entity is either removed from the domain model or a new module is introduced under src/modules/props/.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Changes to other domains or modules not related to 'props'
